chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 772 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 30.01.2024 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statedly, petitioner applied for the post of Police Constable in Sukkur Region in the recruitment advertised in the year 2020, and qualified written test; however, viva-voce, he could not qualify and was declared failed. He has filed this petition on the ground that the candidates, who had obtained less marks in the written test, were declared qualified and appointed as Police Constable. This issue, we have already decided in so many petitions at this Bench. The opinion of the interview committee, we are not eligible or competent to substitute for our opinion and determine eligibility of the candidate(s). No case, therefore, even of issuance of notice is made out, and accordingly, this petition is dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
